summary: A Go-based CLI tool for running, detecting, and migrating infrastructure tests with OpenTelemetry support and a Goss migration pathway.
concerns: Heavy reliance on internal packages limits external reuse
Plugin directory exists but integration with core runner is unclear
Goss migration suggests legacy coupling that might introduce tech debt
CLI flags for OpenTelemetry added recently, indicating observability is an afterthought
suggestions: Document the plugin system and how it integrates with the runner
Ensure Goss migration path has a clear deprecation timeline
Expand OpenTelemetry instrumentation beyond CLI flags to internal components
Add integration tests for the Kubernetes examples
